texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Short Notice Inviting Ouotation  for Canteen Services.-
texts.text: Short Notice Inviting Ouotation  for Canteen Services.-

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Sealed quotation  is hereby invited on behalf of Women's Polytechnic,  Hapania, Agartala, Tripura,  799130 under Government of Tripura  from the Registered  / Licensed  I Authoized, experienced and reputed Canteen / Catering Operators having experience  in Govemment/Government  Undertaking  / Public / Private for operating  the Canteen at Women's Polytechnic,Hapania,  Agutala.
texts.text: Sealed quotation  is hereby invited on behalf of Women's Polytechnic,  Hapania, Agartala, Tripura,  799130 under Government of Tripura  from the Registered  / Licensed  I Authoized, experienced and reputed Canteen / Catering Operators having experience  in Govemment/Government  Undertaking  / Public / Private for operating  the Canteen at Women's Polytechnic,Hapania,  Agutala.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The last date of submission  of quotations  on the tender submission  box in the chamber of Princippl,  Women's Polytechnic, Hapania along with all necessary  documents is 22"d October, 2024 by 1.00 PM. The quotations  will be opened  on the same day at 2 pm (if possible)  in presence of intending  bidders.  Quotations  received after due date and time will not be entertained.  The undersigned  reserves the right to reject any quotation without assigning any.reason.
texts.text: The last date of submission  of quotations  on the tender submission  box in the chamber of Princippl,  Women's Polytechnic, Hapania along with all necessary  documents is 22"d October, 2024 by 1.00 PM. The quotations  will be opened  on the same day at 2 pm (if possible)  in presence of intending  bidders.  Quotations  received after due date and time will not be entertained.  The undersigned  reserves the right to reject any quotation without assigning any.reason.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Interested bidders are kindly requested  to contact  with the college authority  for details guidelines  for generating  the individual quotations  for set up the canteen at the Institute. The details including terms and conditions  and guidelines will also be uploaded  in the Institute Website. ,
texts.text: Interested bidders are kindly requested  to contact  with the college authority  for details guidelines  for generating  the individual quotations  for set up the canteen at the Institute. texts.orig: TERMS & CONDITIONS  OF CONTRACT  _  FOR RUNNING  A CANTEEN  IN WOMEN'S POLYTECHNIC,  HAPANIA, AGARTA  L A, 7  gg  130

texts.label: text
texts.orig: {Please enclose this document  along with tender papers and submit)
texts.text: {Please enclose this document  along with tender papers and submit)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1' The agreement  shall be valid initially  for a period  of one  {01)  year  from the date of agreement  and thereafter  it may be extended for a further period  as may be necessary on mutual  agreement  and at the discretion  of the institute  authority. And if the contractors  discontinue/withdraw  their service within this period,  the security  money will be forfeited.
texts.text: 1' The agreement  shall be valid initially  for a period  of one  {01)  year  from the date of agreement  and thereafter  it may be extended for a further period  as may be necessary on mutual  agreement  and at the discretion  of the institute  authority. And if the contractors  discontinue/withdraw  their service within this period,  the security  money will be forfeited.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2' The selected  contractor will be have to deposit a security  money of Rs. 3000/- (Three thousand only) for the contract period.
texts.text: 2' The selected  contractor will be have to deposit a security  money of Rs. 3000/- (Three thousand only) for the contract period.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4, The contractor will keep the canteen neat and clean.
texts.text: 4, The contractor will keep the canteen neat and clean.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3' The catering service  will be provided  at the rates  approved  by college authority.
texts.text: 3' The catering service  will be provided  at the rates  approved  by college authority.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5. The canteen must be operational  during college hours.
texts.text: The canteen must be operational  during college hours.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 7'  The contractor and staff should adhere by the security norms of the institute. The contractor  would be responsible for conduct of his/her  staff.
texts.text: 7'  The contractor and staff should adhere by the security norms of the institute. The contractor  would be responsible for conduct of his/her  staff.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 9' The contractor will engage only canteen staff over  the age of 1g years  in accordance with labor laws.
texts.text: 9' The contractor will engage only canteen staff over  the age of 1g years  in accordance with labor laws.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 6'  utilize  the available floor space  for maximum  seating arrangement,  efficient service  and optimum utilization of the kitchen floor space. However, college management  will not allow the service provider  to make any internal/external  structural changes, without its prior  approval.
texts.text: 6'  utilize  the available floor space  for maximum  seating arrangement,  efficient service  and optimum utilization of the kitchen floor space. However, college management  will not allow the service provider  to make any internal/external  structural changes, without its prior  approval.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 8'  water and electricity will be provided  by the institute free of cost for serving  food and other items.
texts.text: 8'  water and electricity will be provided  by the institute free of cost for serving  food and other items.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 10' The contract may be terminated  by giving  one month's notice from either side. However, if it has been food/reported  that there has been a gross  misconduct, negligence,  non-compliance  of orders requiring  immediate  action, the  principle  shall have  the rights to revoke the contract immediately  without any notice and atso the security money will be forfeited.
texts.text: 10' The contract may be terminated  by giving  one month's notice from either side. However, if it has been food/reported  that there has been a gross  misconduct, negligence,  non-compliance  of orders requiring  immediate  action, the  principle  shall have  the rights to revoke the contract immediately  without any notice and atso the security money will be forfeited.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 11' The contractor will be responsible for proper  handling  and safe custody of the canteen, Repair and maintenance  of the equipment  will be carried out by the contractor and he will not claim  any reimbursement  of expenses on this account.
texts.text: 11' The contractor will be responsible for proper  handling  and safe custody of the canteen, Repair and maintenance  of the equipment  will be carried out by the contractor and he will not claim  any reimbursement  of expenses on this account.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 12' In case of any food poisoning/contamination  the contractor will be held fully responsible and he will bear all the expenses caused due to food poisoning/contamination.
texts.text: 12' In case of any food poisoning/contamination  the contractor will be held fully responsible and he will bear all the expenses caused due to food poisoning/contamination.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 13' The contractor  will employ  adequate number  of staff in order to maintain  efficiency  and proper  supply of food items in the stipulated  time.
texts.text: 13' The contractor  will employ  adequate number  of staff in order to maintain  efficiency  and proper  supply of food items in the stipulated  time.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 14' All persons  engaged  by the contractor shall be the contractor's own employees and they will claim no privileges  from PRINCIPAL,  women's  polytechnic.  The contractor will be directly  responsible for the administration  of his employees as regards  general  discipline and Courteous behavior.
texts.text: 14' All persons  engaged  by the contractor shall be the contractor's own employees and they will claim no privileges  from PRINCIPAL,  women's  polytechnic.  The contractor will be directly  responsible for the administration  of his employees as regards  general  discipline and Courteous behavior.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Financial Part
texts.text: Financial Part

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The financial comparison  of the bidders will be made on the basis of core food items. Additional food items may be added to the menu with prior permission  from the college.  This will not be considered  for the comparative  statement.  Any shortfall in the quality  and quantity as in the core menu will lead to withdrawal  of permission  to operate  and termination  of the canteen service agreement.
texts.text: The financial comparison  of the bidders will be made on the basis of core food items. Additional food items may be added to the menu with prior permission  from the college.  This will not be considered  for the comparative  statement.  Any shortfall in the quality  and quantity as in the core menu will lead to withdrawal  of permission  to operate  and termination  of the canteen service agreement.
